title: vvp: Improve partial vector write handling

features.name: 2-state vector blocking partial write
features.description: Code should include a blocking partial write to a 2-state vector using bit-select range assignment

features.name: 2-state vector non-blocking partial write
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking partial write to a 2-state vector using bit-select range assignment

features.name: 2-state vector out-of-bounds partial write
features.description: Code should include an out-of-bounds partial write to a 2-state vector where the bit-select range exceeds vector bounds

features.name: 2-state vector variable index partial write
features.description: Code should include a variable-index partial write to a 2-state vector using the i+:n syntax

features.name: 2-state vector non-blocking event-controlled partial write
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking event-controlled partial write to a 2-state vector
